title: Fumyr's Skyblock Pack
description: A Hypixel Skyblock project pack, created by Jagful/Fumyr. This pack aims to make your Skyblock experience more fun than ever, shaped by the feedback of its users.
body:
## ON HOLD, please notify me if you'd like to see more of this pack.

![Weirder Tuba](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0270b0cbc105dec2b53ee03119f5838206b4a552.png)

**Fumyr's is a Hypixel Skyblock resource pack project. We (I) aim to make every item in the game a texture.**

The creation of this pack is very interactive with the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/t8DVmgrz4b), contribute to community goals, vote on polls, and provide feedback for the pack within the server.

Currently the 1.21.10 version is more developed, if you want the 1.8.9 port to be updated, let me know.

**Requires [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament) for 1.21.5-1.21.10**

**Requires Optifine M6 and [Not Enough Updates](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughupdates) 2.0+ for 1.8.9**

## Feedback Guide:
- Join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/t8DVmgrz4b).
- Go to #fumyrs-feedback or #fumyrs-item-requests
- Submit feedback in any, way, shape or form you like.

## Support Guide:
- In the Discord Server, go to #fumyrs-support
